channel.title: "Aphis valerianae" on DICE Lab: Diversity In Changing Environments
channel.description: Recent content in "Aphis valerianae" on DICE Lab: Diversity In Changing Environments

item.title: Mechanisms underlying plant sexual dimorphism in multi-trophic arthropod communities
item.description: Abstract A growing body of research documents the importance of plant genetic effects on arthropod community structure.

item.title: Influence of macronutrient imbalance on native ant foraging and interspecific interactions in the field
item.description: Abstract Ants interact with a diversity of organisms.
